Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input An event log tabular data describing a business process with three cases Output A Process Tree model hierarchical structure representing the discovered process Constraints Use specific operators specific object definitions and balance fitness precision and simplicity Goal Capture the main flow the optional repeating loop Request Missing Info plus Re validation and the final steps

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log Activities RA Receive Application VF Validate Form AE Assess Eligibility RMI Request Missing Info AD Approval Decision SC Send Confirmation AC Archive Case Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC No RMI loop Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Identify Patterns and Control Flow Start All cases start with Receive Application RA Middle All cases proceed to Validate Form VF then Assess Eligibility AE End All cases end with AD SC AC

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After AE there is a variation Case 2 goes straight to Approval Decision AD Case 1 goes RMI VF AD Case 3 goes RMI RMI VF AD This suggests a loop involving RMI and potentially VF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Refined Flow RA VF AE Loop RMI VF or Just RMI AD SC AC So it is an XOR choice Path 1 AD Direct Path 2 RMI Loop VF AD

Name: Validation - NE
Text: If I use X AD and star RMI RMI This does not match Case 3 RMI RMI VF

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Problem star RMI RMI forces odd numbers of RMI Case 3 needs 2 RMIs How to get 2 RMIs We need A equals RMI B equals tau So star RMI tau allows 1 2 3 or more RMIs

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the tree is sequence RA VF AE X tau sequence star RMI tau VF AD SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This fits Case 2 tau path This fits Case 1 1 RMI then VF This fits Case 3 2 RMI then VF

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: I will provide the notation representation as it is the most concise and standard way to describe the structure

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final check Case 2 visible trace RA VF AE AD SC AC matches Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC matches Case 3 visible trace RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC matches
